name: rds_performance_insights
description: RDS Performance Insights — top SQL by AAS for a given window. Handler accepts both DBInstanceIdentifier (e.g. 'dbaops-poc-aurora-pg-writer') and DbiResourceId ('db-XXXX'); DBInstanceIdentifier is auto-resolved via RDS DescribeDBInstances. group_by accepts a PI group prefix ('db.sql_tokenized' / 'db.wait_event' / 'db.host' / 'db.user' / 'db.application') OR a full dimension name (e.g. 'db.sql_tokenized.statement') — the handler truncates to prefix automatically. Returns {group, top_sql:[{label, statement, dimensions, aas}]}.

group_by.description: PI group prefix or dimension name. Default 'db.sql_tokenized'.
